name: Chicken Spectacular
recipeIngredient: 1 package Uncle Ben's Wild White Rice, cooked
2 cups French style green beans, drained
1 medium jar sliced pimientos, for color (if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Pour the mixture into a 2 1/2 or 3 quart casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
4. To freeze, prepare the dish but do not cook before freezing.
